basics.name: Haesol Shin
basics.label: Undergraduate Student in Artificial Intelligence
basics.summary: Undergraduate student majoring in Artificial Intelligence at Chungnam National University. Undergraduate research assistant at DO Lab, interested in Text-to-Speech, speech synthesis, controllable speech generation, and generative AI.

work.name: DO Lab
work.summary: Research on Text-to-Speech, speech synthesis, and generative AI.
highlights: Interested in controllable speech generation and style consistency in TTS.
Exploring multimodal generative models and practical AI systems.

projects.name: VoiceStudio
projects.summary: Unified toolkit for text-style prompted speech synthesis and voice editing.

projects.name: PyREPL
projects.summary: UI-enabled Python REPL for Android, iOS, and desktop environments.

projects.name: toolchain
projects.summary: Python multiplatform build plugin and toolchain for Kotlin Multiplatform Mobile workflows.
